sin.title: Social Insurance Number
sin.why: SINs are permanent identifiers tied to tax records, employment, and benefits. Exposure enables identity theft and fraud. Never share with AI tools.
sin.action: This will be replaced with [SIN_REDACTED]. The AI can still process your request without the actual number.

student_number.title: U of T Student Number
student_number.why: Student numbers are linked to academic records in ACORN — grades, enrollment, financial aid. Combined with a name, this uniquely identifies a student.
student_number.action: This will be replaced with [STUDENT_ID_N]. Use it as a reference when reading the AI's response.

health_card.title: Ontario Health Card
health_card.why: Health card numbers provide access to medical records and services. Exposure can lead to medical identity theft and insurance fraud.
health_card.action: This will be replaced with [HEALTH_CARD_N]. Never share health card numbers with any AI tool.

credit_card.title: Credit Card Number
credit_card.why: Credit card numbers enable unauthorized purchases. Even partial numbers combined with other information can be exploited.
credit_card.action: This will be replaced with [CREDIT_CARD_N]. If you need to discuss a transaction, use the last 4 digits only.

email.title: Email Address
email.why: Email addresses can be used for phishing, spam, and social engineering. They're often linked to other accounts and services.
email.action: This will be replaced with [EMAIL_N]. Consider whether the AI actually needs the email to help you.

email_uoft.title: U of T Email Address
email_uoft.why: U of T email addresses contain UTORids and are directly linkable to the university directory, academic records, and internal systems.
email_uoft.action: This will be replaced with [EMAIL_N]. U of T emails are especially sensitive because they connect to institutional identity.

phone.title: Phone Number
phone.why: Phone numbers can be used for social engineering, SIM swapping, and unauthorized account access. They're increasingly used as identity verification.
phone.action: This will be replaced with [PHONE_N]. The AI doesn't need your real phone number to help you.

utorid.title: UTORid
utorid.why: UTORids are U of T login credentials used for ACORN, Quercus, email, library, and all university services. Sharing them risks unauthorized access to your academic life.
utorid.action: This will be replaced with [UTORID_N]. Never share your UTORid with external services.

employee_id.title: U of T Employee ID
employee_id.why: Employee IDs are linked to HR records, payroll, and internal systems. They can be used to impersonate staff or access restricted resources.
